channel.title: AIIB Job Vacancies
channel.description: Current job opportunities at Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank (AIIB)

item.title: Manager, Shareholder Relations
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Manager, Shareholder Relations. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 21, 2026.

item.title: Principal Finance Officer, Head of Financial Accounting and Reporting
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Principal Finance Officer, Head of Financial Accounting and Reporting. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 20, 2026.

item.title: Principal Finance Officer, Head of Loan Management
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Principal Finance Officer, Head of Loan Management. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 20, 2026.

item.title: Senior Investment Officer, Financial Sponsor Debt Business
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Senior Investment Officer, Financial Sponsor Debt Business. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 07, 2026.

item.title: Finance Officer, Loan Management
item.description: AIIB has a vacancy for the position of Finance Officer, Loan Management. Location: Beijing, China. Closing date: Apr 06, 2026.
